name: CareerMentor AI
description: IBM Watsonx.ai (Granite) powered agentic career counseling companion for students.

WATSONX_API_KEY.description: Your IBM Cloud API key from https://cloud.ibm.com/iam/apikeys

WATSONX_PROJECT_ID.description: Your IBM Watsonx project ID from https://dataplatform.cloud.ibm.com

WATSONX_MODEL_ID.description: Watsonx model ID to use for generation

FLASK_SECRET_KEY.description: Random secret key for Flask session security

FLASK_DEBUG.description: Enable Flask debug mode (set to False in production)

MAX_TOKENS.description: Maximum tokens for AI response generation
